note: Source: Election Commission of India. AIADMK+ (NTNF alliance) swept power in a historic landslide. AIADMK alone won 150; DMDK (Vijayakanth) won 29. DMK+ (UPA) won only 31: DMK-23, INC-5, PMK-3.

Source: Election Commission of India. AIADMK (ran alone) won 136 seats. DMK+INC alliance won 98 seats: DMK-89, INC-8, IUML-1. Notable FPTP anomaly: DMK+INC received 43.5% vs AIADMK 40.8%, yet won fewer seats.
Source: Election Commission of India. DMK+ (INDIA alliance) won 159 seats: DMK-133, INC-18, VCK-4, CPI-2, CPM-2. AIADMK+ won 75: AIADMK-66, BJP-4, PMK-5. Election held during COVID-19 pandemic.
